prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年理科（物理类）最低位次依次约18502→21403→22193→21956→27996名，整体呈后移趋势，尤其2025年跳升约6000名，基准位次约27996名；该校在四川理科（物理类）招生计划2021–2025年分别为131、131、129、126、132人，2026年计划140人，较2025年扩招约6%，扩招对竞争有一定缓解作用。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 合肥工业大学为211工程、双一流建设高校，软科中国大学排名约第80名，近年排名稳中有升（2021年82→2026年80），属中上水平理工类高校；2025 年声誉评价偏负面，主要涉及热门专业投档线暴跌、部分专业无人报考等信号；2026年声誉仍偏负面，涉及学术不端事件；抖音热度排名第77（一般），整体报考关注度不高。第五轮学科评估中管理科学与工程获评A级，为该校唯一A-及以上学科；机械工程、仪器科学、材料科学等工科实力较强，与招生专业高度匹配。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等工科专业持续高热推荐，与合肥工业大学工科特色契合，对考生有较强吸引力；四川省2026年考生总数约53.5万，较2025年明显 增加，按比例估算物理类考生约32.9万（+15.5%），竞争加剧；合肥工业大学位于安徽省合肥市，非四川省本地高校，无 地域招生倾斜；该校在四川招生规模中等（约140人），属跨省正常招生。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年位次大幅后移的基准、2026年扩招约6%的缓解作用、四川省物理类考生增 加约15.5%带来的竞争加剧、声誉偏负面但工科专业热度持续的双向影响，预计2026年最低位次，预测最低位次约28814名，区间28314–29314名 。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间28314–29314名内，建议以二档专业为主力填报（自动化、车辆工程、机械设计制造及其自动化等），一档专业（计算机、电气、集成电路）可作为冲刺选择，三 档专业（工业工程、建筑学等）作为保底。位次明显优于区间下限（<28314名）可重点冲刺一档王牌工科专业。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for science (physics category) were approximately 18502 → 21403 → 22193 → 21956 → 27996, showing an overall backward trend, especially in 2025 with a jump of about 6000 places, with a baseline ranking of about 27996; the enrollment plan for this university in Sichuan for science (physics category) from 2021 to 2025 was 131, 131, 129, 126, 132 respectively, with a planned 140 students in 2026, an increase of about 6% compared to 2025, which somewhat alleviates competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Hefei University of Technology is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university, ranking about 80th in the Soft Science Chinese University Rankings, with a stable upward trend in recent years (82 in 2021 → 80 in 2026), belonging to the upper-middle level of science and engineering universities; the reputation evaluation in 2025 was somewhat negative, mainly involving a sharp drop in admission scores for popular majors and some majors having no applicants; the reputation in 2026 remains somewhat negative, involving academic misconduct incidents; Douyin popularity ranking is 77th (average), with overall low attention for application. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Management Science and Engineering was rated A, the only A- or above discipline at this university; mechanical engineering, instrumentation science, materials science, and other engineering disciplines are strong, highly matching the enrollment majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer science, electronic information/communication, electrical engineering, and other engineering majors continue to be highly recommended, aligning with Hefei University of Technology's engineering characteristics, strongly attracting candidates; the total number of candidates in Sichuan in 2026 is about 535,000, a significant increase from 2025, with an estimated 329,000 physics category candidates (+15.5%), intensifying competition; Hefei University of Technology is located in Hefei, Anhui Province, not a local university in Sichuan, with no regional enrollment preference; the university's enrollment scale in Sichuan is moderate (about 140 students), which is normal cross-provincial enrollment.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Combining the baseline of a significant backward shift in rankings in 2025, the mitigating effect of an enrollment increase of about 6% in 2026, the intensified competition due to a 15.5% increase in physics category candidates in Sichuan, and the dual impact of a somewhat negative reputation but sustained popularity of engineering majors, the predicted minimum ranking for 2026 is approximately 28814, with a range of 28314–29314.

- Chemical Engineering and Technology
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 28314–29314, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors (Automation, Vehicle Engineering, Mechanical Design, Manufacturing and Automation, etc.) as the main choices, Tier 1 majors (Computer Science, Electrical Engineering, Integrated Circuits) as reach options, and Tier 3 majors (Industrial Engineering, Architecture, etc.) as safety options. For rankings significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<28314), it is advisable to focus on reaching for Tier 1 flagship engineering majors.

prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 合肥工业大学为211工程 、双一流建设高校，软科中国大学排名约第80名，属中上水平理工类高校，文科招生规模较小；2025年声誉偏负面（热门专业投档线暴跌），2026年仍偏负面（ 学术不端）；抖音热度排名第77（一般），整体报考关注度不高；该校以工科见长，文科仅设法学、思想政治教育、英语三个专业，无A级文科类学科，文科吸 引力相对有限。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 法学专业社会热度偏热（推荐），思想政治教育热度平稳，英语专业热度一般观望；四川省2026年考生总数约53.5万，按比例估算历史类 考生约20.6万（+15.7%），竞争加剧。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次4408名、2026年大幅缩招40%导致竞争急剧加剧、历史类考生 增加约15.7%进一步推高竞争、学校文科实力有限等因素，预计2026年最低位次，预测最低位次约3270名，区间2770–3770名。

- 思想政治教育

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for liberal arts (history category) were approximately 4239 → 5190 → 4788 → 4939 → 4408, fluctuating within the 4200–5200 range, with a 2025 baseline of about 4408. The university's enrollment plan in Sichuan for liberal arts (history category) from 2021 to 2025 was 10, 10, 11, 15, and 10 students respectively. The 2026 plan is only 6 students, a sharp 40% reduction from 2025, significantly intensifying competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Hefei University of Technology is a 211 Project and Double First-Class university, ranked approximately 80th in the Soft Science China University Rankings, placing it at an upper-middle level among science and engineering universities, with a small liberal arts enrollment. In 2025, its reputation was somewhat negative (sharp drop in admission scores for popular majors), and in 2026 it remains somewhat negative (academic misconduct). Its Douyin popularity ranking is 77th (average), indicating generally low attention for admissions. The university excels in engineering, with only three liberal arts majors: Law, Ideological and Political Education, and English, and no A-level liberal arts disciplines, making its liberal arts appeal relatively limited.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The Law major has high social popularity (recommended), Ideological and Political Education has stable popularity, and English has average popularity (wait and see). In 2026, the total number of examinees in Sichuan is approximately 535,000, with an estimated 206,000 history category examinees (+15.7%), intensifying competition.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 4408, the sharp 40% enrollment reduction in 2026 leading to drastically intensified competition, the approximately 15.7% increase in history category examinees further heightening competition, and the university's limited liberal arts strength, the predicted minimum ranking for 2026 is approximately 3270, with a range of 2770–3770.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 2770–3770, the university offers only three liberal arts majors. It is recommended to prioritize Law and Ideological and Political Education as main choices, with English as a safety option. Rankings significantly better than the lower limit (<2770) can focus on aiming for the Law major.
